## Contract

**Delegator use only.** Any agent that launches subagents reads this registry to resolve compact rules, then injects matching rule text into subagent prompts under `## Project Standards (auto-resolved)`.

Subagents still read their assigned executor/phase skill. During normal runtime, they do **not** independently discover or load additional project/user `SKILL.md` files or this registry; project/user rules arrive pre-digested.
